chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 688 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3804/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.2709/2022 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.2710/2022 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 16.08.2022 Mr. Abdul Wahab W. Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant petition, however, states that the petitioner shall avail the remedy available to him before the relevant forum in accordance with law. The petition is, therefore, stands dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. The petitioner, however, may approach the concerned forum for redressal of his grievances. Judge Judge ARBROHI
